additions.description: The Real Brokerage Inc, operating as REAX, is a real estate brokerage company that provides residential real estate services. The company's main products and services include brokerage services for buying, selling, and renting properties, as well as title and escrow services. REAX focuses on the residential real estate market in the United States and Canada, leveraging its technology platform to support its network of agents and clients.

Plug Power Inc. is a leading provider of hydrogen fuel cell solutions, offering a range of products and services for the clean energy market. The company's main products include fuel cell systems, hydrogen refueling stations, and fuel cell-powered forklifts, primarily targeting the material handling and stationary power markets. Plug Power's solutions aim to replace traditional fossil fuel-based power systems with cleaner, more efficient hydrogen fuel cell technology.

AMC Entertainment Holdings Inc. is a leading theatrical exhibition company that owns and operates a global chain of movie theaters. The company's main products and services include film exhibition, food and beverage sales, and premium formats such as IMAX and 3D screenings. AMC's market focus is on providing an immersive cinematic experience to moviegoers, with a presence in the United States, Europe, and other international markets.

European Wax Center Inc (EWCZ) is a leading personal care company that specializes in waxing services and products. The company operates a chain of centers offering hair removal and other beauty services, as well as selling a range of proprietary waxing and skincare products. European Wax Center focuses on providing high-quality, convenient, and affordable waxing experiences to its customers, primarily targeting the health and wellness-conscious consumer market.

Patterson-UTI Energy Inc (PTEN) is a leading provider of onshore drilling and pressure pumping services in the United States. The company's main products and services include contract drilling, pressure pumping, and directional drilling, which support the exploration and production of oil and natural gas. PTEN's market focus is on the North American oil and gas industry, serving a diverse range of customers, including major oil and gas companies and independent operators.

Hudson Pacific Properties Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns and operates a portfolio of office and media and entertainment properties. The company's main focus is on acquiring, developing, and redeveloping office buildings, particularly in the Western United States, with a strong presence in Los Angeles, San Francisco, and Seattle. Its properties cater to a diverse range of tenants, including tech, entertainment, and traditional office users.

Hudson Pacific Properties Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns and operates a portfolio of office and media and entertainment properties. The company's main focus is on acquiring, developing, and redeveloping office buildings, particularly in the Western United States, with a strong presence in Los Angeles, San Francisco, and Seattle. Its properties cater to a diverse range of tenants, including tech, entertainment, and traditional office users.

Plug Power Inc. is a leading provider of hydrogen fuel cell solutions, offering a range of products and services for the clean energy market. The company's main products include fuel cell systems, hydrogen refueling stations, and fuel cell-powered forklifts, primarily targeting the material handling and stationary power markets. Plug Power's solutions aim to replace traditional fossil fuel-based power systems with cleaner, more efficient hydrogen fuel cell technology.

European Wax Center Inc (EWCZ) is a leading personal care company that specializes in waxing services and products. The company operates a chain of centers offering hair removal and other beauty services, as well as selling a range of proprietary waxing and skincare products. European Wax Center focuses on providing high-quality, convenient, and affordable waxing experiences to its customers, primarily targeting the health and wellness-conscious consumer market.

Sabre Corp is a leading technology provider to the global travel industry, offering software and services that power travel booking systems, airline and hotel operations, and travel agency management. The company's main products include its SabreSonic passenger management system, Sabre AirCentre airline operations suite, and SynXis hospitality management solutions. Sabre's market focus is on airlines, hotels, travel agencies, and other travel industry stakeholders, providing them with technology to manage their operations and customer interactions.

ACV Auctions Inc is a digital automotive marketplace that provides a platform for dealers to buy and sell used vehicles. The company's main product is its online auction platform, which offers a range of services including inspections, title management, and transportation. ACV Auctions focuses on the used car market, aiming to increase transparency and efficiency in the wholesale automotive industry.

ThredUp Inc. is an online consignment store that specializes in second-hand clothing and accessories. The company's main products and services include a platform for buying and selling gently used women's and children's apparel, as well as a "goody box" subscription service. ThredUp's market focus is on sustainable and affordable fashion, targeting environmentally conscious consumers and budget-friendly shoppers.

Cleanspark Inc (CLSK) is a financial technology company that provides energy solutions and Bitcoin mining services. The company's main products and services include modular data centers, energy management systems, and cryptocurrency mining operations. Cleanspark focuses on the intersection of energy and finance, aiming to make Bitcoin mining more sustainable and energy-efficient.

Veris Residential Inc, formerly known as Mack-Cali Realty Corporation, is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns and operates a portfolio of residential and commercial properties. The company's main focus is on multifamily and commercial assets, primarily in the New York/New Jersey metropolitan area. Veris Residential provides leasing, property management, and development services to its residents and tenants, with a goal of creating vibrant and sustainable communities.

Enhabit Inc, operating as EHAB, is a provider of home health and hospice services. The company offers a range of healthcare services, including skilled nursing, physical therapy, and hospice care, to patients in their homes. Enhabit's main focus is on delivering high-quality, patient-centered care to individuals with chronic conditions, disabilities, or terminal illnesses, primarily in the United States.

AES Corp is a diversified utility company that generates and distributes electrical power. The company's main products and services include electricity generation from various sources, including fossil fuels, nuclear, and renewable energy, as well as energy storage solutions. AES operates in over 15 countries, focusing on providing reliable and sustainable energy solutions to its customers worldwide.

Apartment Investment & Management Co (AIV) is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns and operates a portfolio of residential properties. The company's main products and services include apartment rentals, with a focus on providing housing solutions to residents in the United States. AIV's market focus is on the residential rental market, with a concentration on urban and suburban areas with high demand for apartment living.

ClearPoint Neuro Inc (CLPT) is a medical device company that develops and commercializes innovative platforms for performing minimally invasive surgical procedures in the brain. The company's main products include the ClearPoint Neuro Navigation System, which enables real-time visualization and guidance for neurosurgeons. ClearPoint's primary market focus is on neurosurgery, with applications in treating conditions such as brain cancer, neurovascular disorders, and movement disorders.

Helix Energy Solutions Group Inc (HLX) is a leading provider of specialty services to the offshore energy industry. The company's main services include well intervention, robotics, and subsea engineering, with a focus on maximizing production, reducing costs, and enhancing safety for its clients. Helix operates globally, serving major oil and gas companies with its fleet of vessels and remotely operated vehicles (ROVs).

Editas Medicine Inc is a biotechnology company that develops and commercializes gene editing therapies using its proprietary CRISPR/Cas9 and CRISPR/Cas12a technologies. The company's main products and services focus on treating serious diseases, including genetic disorders, cancer, and eye diseases, with its lead programs targeting inherited retinal diseases and sickle cell disease. Editas Medicine aims to revolutionize the treatment of genetic diseases with its gene editing platform.

DMC Global Inc, also known as DynaEnergetics (formerly BOOM), is a diversified company that operates in the industrials sector. The company's main products and services include explosive products and oilfield services, with a focus on the energy and industrial industries. Its DynaEnergetics segment manufactures and sells explosive components and related accessories used in the oil and gas industry.

Vanda Pharmaceuticals Inc is a biopharmaceutical company that focuses on the development and commercialization of innovative therapies for central nervous system disorders. The company's main products include Fanapt, an atypical antipsychotic for the treatment of schizophrenia, and Hetlioz, a melatonin receptor agonist for the treatment of non-24-hour sleep-wake disorder. Vanda's market focus is on addressing unmet medical needs in the fields of psychiatry and neurology.

Shoals Technologies Group Inc (SHLS) is a solar energy company that designs and manufactures electrical balance of system (EBOS) solutions for solar panels. The company's main products include combiners, recombiners, and cable assemblies that help optimize solar panel performance and efficiency. Shoals Technologies focuses on the renewable energy market, serving solar panel manufacturers, engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) companies, and project developers worldwide.

AdaptHealth Corp is a medical device company that provides home medical equipment and supplies to patients. The company's main products and services include sleep therapy equipment, oxygen therapy, and diabetes management supplies, among others. AdaptHealth focuses on serving patients with chronic conditions, partnering with healthcare providers and payers to deliver medical equipment and services in the home setting.

Tandem Diabetes Care Inc is a medical device company that develops and manufactures insulin pumps and other diabetes management products. The company's main products include the t:slim X2 insulin pump and the Control-IQ advanced diabetes management system, which utilize automated insulin dosing technology. Tandem Diabetes Care focuses on providing innovative solutions for people with diabetes, particularly type 1 diabetes, to improve their glucose management and overall quality of life.

Five9 Inc (FIVN) is a cloud-based software company that provides contact center solutions to businesses. The company's main product is its Intelligent Cloud Contact Center platform, which offers a range of tools and services for customer service, sales, and marketing teams. Five9's solutions cater to various industries, including healthcare, finance, and retail, with a focus on mid-sized to large enterprises.

Tenable Holdings Inc. is a cybersecurity company that provides vulnerability management and cyber exposure solutions. The company's main products and services include its Tenable.io and Tenable.sc platforms, which help organizations identify, assess, and prioritize vulnerabilities in their systems and networks. Tenable's solutions cater to a wide range of industries, including enterprise, government, and healthcare, with a focus on helping organizations manage and reduce their cyber risk.

TripAdvisor Inc. operates an online travel platform that provides users with travel-related content, pricing, and booking capabilities. The company's main products and services include hotel reviews, travel guides, and booking tools for flights, hotels, and vacation rentals. TripAdvisor's market focus is on helping travelers plan and book their trips, catering to a global audience of leisure and business travelers.

Funko Inc. is a leading pop culture consumer products company that designs, sources, and distributes highly stylized vinyl figures, plush toys, and other collectibles. The company's main products include its iconic Pop! figures, as well as other lines such as Dorbz, Mystery Minis, and Keychains. Funko's products are focused on popular culture, including movies, TV shows, video games, music, and sports, and are sold through various channels, including online marketplaces, retail stores, and its own e-commerce platform.

RMR Group Inc. is a holding company that provides management services to companies in the real estate and related industries. The company's main services include property management, accounting, and other administrative support to its client companies, which own and operate commercial and industrial properties. RMR Group's market focus is on the real estate sector, with a portfolio of companies that own and operate over 2,100 properties worldwide.

The Chemours Company is a specialty chemicals company that provides innovative solutions to various industries. Its main products and services include fluoroproducts, chemical solutions, and titanium technologies, which are used in applications such as refrigeration, air conditioning, and industrial processes. Chemours' market focus is on the global chemicals market, serving industries like automotive, construction, and electronics.

DNOW (DNOW Inc.) is a leading global distributor of energy and industrial products. The company provides pipeline, mechanical, and facility construction and completion products, as well as supply chain management solutions to the energy and industrial markets. DNOW's main products and services include equipment, parts, and supplies for the oil and gas, refining, chemical, and power industries.

Medical Properties Trust Inc (MPT) is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that invests in healthcare facilities, primarily hospitals and other medical properties. The company provides capital to healthcare operators in exchange for long-term leases, generating rental income from its portfolio of properties. MPT's main focus is on acquiring and owning net-leased healthcare facilities, with a portfolio spanning the United States and internationally.

The Geo Group, Inc. is a leading provider of correctional, detention, and residential treatment services to government agencies. The company's main products and services include the design, construction, management, and operation of correctional and detention facilities, as well as rehabilitation programs and services. Geo Group's market focus is on government agencies, primarily in the United States, Australia, and the United Kingdom.

sells.company_name: KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc

sells.description: Plug Power Inc. is a leading provider of hydrogen fuel cell solutions, offering a range of products and services for the clean energy market. The company's main products include fuel cell systems, hydrogen refueling stations, and fuel cell-powered forklifts, primarily targeting the material handling and stationary power markets. Plug Power's solutions aim to replace traditional fossil fuel-based power systems with cleaner, more efficient hydrogen fuel cell technology.

Service Properties Trust (SVC) is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns a diverse portfolio of hotels and other properties. The company's main focus is on the hospitality sector, with a portfolio of hotels operated under various brands such as Marriott, Hilton, and Hyatt. SVC generates revenue primarily through hotel operations, as well as rental income from its net lease properties.

JetBlue Airways Corp (JBLU) is a low-cost airline that provides passenger air transportation services. The company's main products and services include domestic and international flights, as well as ancillary services such as baggage handling and in-flight entertainment. JetBlue focuses on the leisure and business travel markets, operating primarily in the United States, the Caribbean, and Latin America.

Bumble Inc (BMBL) is a online dating and social networking company that operates a portfolio of apps, including Bumble and Badoo. The company's main products and services focus on providing a platform for users to connect with each other, with a strong emphasis on women's empowerment and safety. Bumble's market focus is on the global online dating market, targeting young adults and individuals seeking meaningful relationships.

ThredUp Inc. is an online consignment store that specializes in second-hand clothing and accessories. The company's main products and services include a platform for buying and selling gently used women's and children's apparel, as well as a "goody box" subscription service. ThredUp's market focus is on sustainable and affordable fashion, targeting environmentally conscious consumers and budget-friendly shoppers.

Cerus Corporation is a biomedical products company that develops and commercializes technologies to enhance blood safety. The company's main product is the INTERCEPT Blood System, which is designed to inactivate pathogens in blood components, such as plasma, platelets, and red blood cells. Cerus' primary market focus is on the global blood transfusion industry, aiming to reduce the risk of transfusion-transmitted infections.

BigBear.ai Holdings Inc (BBAI) is a technology company that provides artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) solutions to its clients. The company's main products and services include data analytics, cyber security, and AI-powered decision support systems, primarily serving the US government and commercial markets. BigBear.ai's solutions aim to help organizations make data-driven decisions and improve operational efficiency.

Plug Power Inc. is a leading provider of hydrogen fuel cell solutions, offering a range of products and services for the clean energy market. The company's main products include fuel cell systems, hydrogen refueling stations, and fuel cell-powered forklifts, primarily targeting the material handling and stationary power markets. Plug Power's solutions aim to replace traditional fossil fuel-based power systems with cleaner, more efficient hydrogen fuel cell technology.

ClearPoint Neuro Inc (CLPT) is a medical device company that develops and commercializes innovative platforms for performing minimally invasive surgical procedures in the brain. The company's main products include the ClearPoint Neuro Navigation System, which enables real-time visualization and guidance for neurosurgeons. ClearPoint's primary market focus is on neurosurgery, with applications in treating conditions such as brain cancer, neurovascular disorders, and movement disorders.

Cars.com is an online automotive marketplace that connects buyers and sellers of new and used vehicles. The company provides a platform for consumers to research, compare, and purchase vehicles, as well as offers digital marketing solutions for automotive dealers and manufacturers. Its main products and services include online listings, pricing guides, and advertising tools, with a market focus on the US automotive industry.

ON24 Inc. is a software company that provides a cloud-based platform for creating and delivering engaging live and on-demand experiences, such as webinars, virtual events, and multimedia content. The company's main products and services include its ON24 Platform, which enables businesses to create, manage, and track digital experiences for marketing, sales, and customer engagement. ON24's market focus is on helping enterprises and organizations in various industries to drive revenue growth and customer interactions through digital engagement.

Hudson Pacific Properties Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns and operates a portfolio of office and media and entertainment properties. The company's main focus is on acquiring, developing, and redeveloping office buildings, particularly in the Western United States, with a strong presence in Los Angeles, San Francisco, and Seattle. Its properties cater to a diverse range of tenants, including tech, entertainment, and traditional office users.

Myriad Genetics, Inc. is a molecular diagnostic company that develops and markets genetic tests to help guide medical treatment decisions. The company's main products and services include genetic tests for hereditary cancers, such as BRCA1 and BRCA2, as well as tests for other diseases like cardiovascular disease and neurological disorders. Myriad Genetics focuses on the healthcare market, primarily serving patients, healthcare providers, and pharmaceutical companies.

Accelerant Holdings, operating as ARX, is a technology-enabled insurance brokerage firm that provides specialty insurance products and risk management services to businesses. The company's main focus is on serving middle-market companies, particularly those in complex and high-hazard industries. ARX offers a range of insurance solutions, including property, casualty, and cyber liability coverage, tailored to meet the unique needs of its clients.

Astrana Health Inc. operates a network of outpatient healthcare facilities, providing medical services and treatments to patients. The company's main focus is on delivering high-quality, patient-centered care in specialties such as urgent care, primary care, and specialty clinics. Astrana Health aims to increase access to healthcare services, particularly in underserved communities, by offering convenient and affordable medical care options.

Arcus Biosciences Inc. (RCUS) is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing innovative cancer therapies. The company's main products and services include a portfolio of small molecule and antibody-based treatments targeting various types of cancer, with a primary focus on immuno-oncology. Arcus Biosciences aims to improve treatment outcomes for patients with cancer by creating a new generation of cancer therapies that are more effective and have fewer side effects.

ACV Auctions Inc is a digital automotive marketplace that provides a platform for dealers to buy and sell used vehicles. The company's main product is its online auction platform, which offers a range of services including inspections, title management, and transportation. ACV Auctions focuses on the used car market, aiming to increase transparency and efficiency in the wholesale automotive industry.

Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc (IVR) is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that primarily invests in mortgage-backed securities. The company's main products and services include investing in, financing, and managing a portfolio of mortgage-backed securities and other mortgage-related assets. IVR's market focus is on the US residential and commercial mortgage markets, providing financing for various types of properties and earning income through interest payments.

DMC Global Inc, also known as DynaEnergetics (formerly BOOM), is a diversified company that operates in the industrials sector. The company's main products and services include explosive products and oilfield services, with a focus on the energy and industrial industries. Its DynaEnergetics segment manufactures and sells explosive components and related accessories used in the oil and gas industry.

The company's main products include combiners, recombiners, and cable assemblies that help optimize solar panel performance and efficiency. Shoals Technologies focuses on the renewable energy market, serving solar panel manufacturers, engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) companies, and project developers worldwide.

Apartment Investment & Management Co (AIV) is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns and operates a portfolio of residential properties. The company's main products and services include apartment rentals, with a focus on providing housing solutions to residents in the United States. AIV's market focus is on the residential rental market, with a concentration on urban and suburban areas with high demand for apartment living.

Atomera Inc. is a semiconductor materials and technology licensing company that develops and licenses its proprietary Mears Silicon Technology (MST) to semiconductor manufacturers. The company's MST technology aims to improve the performance and efficiency of semiconductors, enabling the creation of smaller, faster, and more powerful chips. Atomera's main focus is on the semiconductor industry, targeting manufacturers of transistors, memory chips, and other semiconductor devices.

AdaptHealth Corp is a medical device company that provides home medical equipment and supplies to patients. AdaptHealth focuses on serving patients with chronic conditions, partnering with healthcare providers and payers to deliver medical equipment and services in the home setting.

Tenable's solutions cater to a wide range of industries, including enterprise, government, and healthcare, with a focus on helping organizations manage and reduce their cyber risk.

Helix Energy Solutions Group Inc (HLX) is a leading provider of specialty services to the offshore energy industry. The company's main services include well intervention, robotics, and subsea engineering, with a focus on maximizing production, reducing costs, and enhancing safety for its clients. Helix operates globally, serving major oil and gas companies with its fleet of vessels and remotely operated vehicles (ROVs).

Orchid Island Capital Inc is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that invests in residential mortgage-backed securities. The company's main products and services include the acquisition, ownership, and management of a diversified portfolio of mortgage-backed securities, with a focus on agency RMBS. Orchid Island Capital's market focus is on generating income and long-term capital appreciation for its shareholders through its investment portfolio.

Cogent Communications Holdings Inc (CCOI) is a multinational tier 1 internet service provider that offers high-speed internet, Ethernet, and colocation services. The company's main products include internet access, data transport, and colocation services, primarily targeting businesses, governments, and other carriers. CCOI's market focus is on providing high-quality, low-latency network services to its customers in North America, Europe, and Asia.

NCR Voyix Corp, operating as VYX, is a technology company that provides omnichannel solutions for retail and hospitality industries. Their main products and services include point-of-sale systems, self-service kiosks, and digital signage, aimed at enhancing customer experience and streamlining operations. VYX focuses on the global retail and hospitality markets, helping businesses to modernize their operations and improve customer engagement.

The Chemours Company is a specialty chemicals company that provides innovative solutions to various industries. Its main products and services include fluoroproducts, chemical solutions, and titanium technologies, which are used in applications such as refrigeration, air conditioning, and industrial processes. Chemours' market focus is on the global chemicals market, serving industries like automotive, construction, and electronics.

Vanda Pharmaceuticals Inc is a biopharmaceutical company that focuses on the development and commercialization of innovative therapies for central nervous system disorders. The company's main products include Fanapt, an atypical antipsychotic for the treatment of schizophrenia, and Hetlioz, a melatonin receptor agonist for the treatment of non-24-hour sleep-wake disorder. Vanda's market focus is on addressing unmet medical needs in the fields of psychiatry and neurology.

The company's main products and services include the design, construction, management, and operation of correctional and detention facilities, as well as rehabilitation programs and services. Geo Group's market focus is on government agencies, primarily in the United States, Australia, and the United Kingdom.

The company provides pipeline, mechanical, and facility construction and completion products, as well as supply chain management solutions to the energy and industrial markets. DNOW's main products and services include equipment, parts, and supplies for the oil and gas, refining, chemical, and power industries.

The company's main focus is on multifamily and commercial assets, primarily in the New York/New Jersey metropolitan area. Veris Residential provides leasing, property management, and development services to its residents and tenants, with a goal of creating vibrant and sustainable communities.

The company's main products include the t:slim X2 insulin pump and the Control-IQ advanced diabetes management system, which utilize automated insulin dosing technology. Tandem Diabetes Care focuses on providing innovative solutions for people with diabetes, particularly type 1 diabetes, to improve their glucose management and overall quality of life.

Alight Inc, formerly known as Alight Solutions, is a cloud-based human capital and technology services company. The company provides a range of software and services, including cloud-based HR, payroll, and benefits administration solutions, to help organizations manage their workforce and optimize business outcomes. Alight's main products and services focus on the human capital management (HCM) market, serving large and medium-sized enterprises globally.

Pediatrix Medical Group Inc, operating as Mednax, is a healthcare company that provides newborn, maternal-fetal, and pediatric medical and surgical services. The company's main services include neonatal care, pediatric cardiology, and other pediatric subspecialty services. Mednax primarily focuses on the healthcare market, partnering with hospitals and healthcare providers to deliver specialized medical care to women and children.

Five9 Inc (FIVN) is a cloud-based software company that provides contact center solutions to businesses. The company's main product is its Intelligent Cloud Contact Center platform, which offers a range of tools and services for customer service, sales, and marketing teams. Five9's solutions cater to various industries, including healthcare, finance, and retail, with a focus on mid-sized to large enterprises.

Jakks Pacific Inc is a designer and marketer of toys and consumer products, primarily focusing on children's entertainment and leisure activities. The company's main products include action figures, dolls, and electronic toys, often based on popular franchises and licenses. Jakks Pacific's market focus is on the global toy industry, catering to the needs of kids and families through its innovative and engaging play experiences.
